items.title: AI-Assisted Migration Tool Helps Teams Move from ingress-nginx to Higress in Minutes
items.summaryShort: AI-Assisted Migration Tool Helps Teams Move from ingress-nginx to Higress in Minutes. The Cloud Native Computing Foundation has highlighted a new AI-assisted migration approach that enabled engineers to migrate 60 ingress-nginx resources to

items.title: Presentation: Building Evals for AI Adoption: From Principles to Practice
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Building Evals for AI Adoption: From Principles to Practice. Mallika Rao discusses the hidden risk of evaluation debt in production AI systems, drawing on her experience at Twitter, Walmart, and Netflix.

items.title: GitHub Slashes Agent Workflow Token Spend up to 62% with Daily Audits and MCP Pruning
items.summaryShort: GitHub Slashes Agent Workflow Token Spend up to 62% with Daily Audits and MCP Pruning. GitHub reports cutting token costs in agentic CI workflows by up to 62% by pruning unused MCP tools, swapping some MCP calls for gh CLI, and running dail

items.title: Presentation: From Founding Engineer to CTO to CEO – At the Same Startup
items.summaryShort: Presentation: From Founding Engineer to CTO to CEO – At the Same Startup. Trisha Ballakur discusses her journey from a backend software engineer to CTO and CEO, using her startup Pointz as a case study.

items.title: Accountability is the Goal for AI, with EU Regulations Supporting Transparency
items.summaryShort: Accountability is the Goal for AI, with EU Regulations Supporting Transparency. AI bias mirrors human bias; both stem from our language and lived experiences.

items.title: Today is the last day to apply to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
items.summaryShort: Today is the last day to apply to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Submit your session topic before today ends for a chance to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026.

items.title: Final 24 hours to save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket
items.summaryShort: Final 24 hours to save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket. You now have until tonight at 11:59 p.m.

items.title: Kiwibit’s AI-powered bird feeder is my new backyard buddy
items.summaryShort: Kiwibit’s AI-powered bird feeder is my new backyard buddy. If you're looking for a fun way to connect with nature while collecting bird species on an app like Pokémon, give this smart feeder a try.
